ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "planner" TEXT /* Name of the planner used (e.g., BKPIECEkConfigDefault) */,
  "elapsed_time" REAL /* Total elapsed time for the trial in seconds */,
  "loss" INTEGER /* Loss metric for the trial */,
  "avg_runs" INTEGER /* Average number of runs in the trial */,
  "t_avg_run_time" REAL /* Average run time in seconds */,
  "t_avg_plan_time" REAL /* Average plan time in seconds */,
  "t_avg_dist" REAL /* Average distance covered in the trial */,
  "t_avg_path_length" REAL /* Average path length in the trial */,
  "t_avg_success" REAL /* Average success rate of the trial (0-1) */,
  "params" TEXT /* JSON object containing detailed configuration parameters for the trial */,
  "trial_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial was conducted */,
  "trial_version" TEXT /* Version number of the trial to track changes over time */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trial */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the trial (0-1) */,
  "number_of_successful_paths" INTEGER /* Number of successful paths generated */,
  "number_of_total_paths" INTEGER /* Total number of paths generated */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the trial was conducted (e.g., lab, real-world) */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_planner FOREIGN KEY ("planner") REFERENCES planners ("planner_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "planners" (
  "planner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planner */,
  "planner_name" TEXT /* Name of the planner (e.g., BKPIECEkConfigDefault) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the planner and its purpose */,
  "planner_version" TEXT /* Version of the planner */,
  "planner_status" TEXT /* Status of the planner (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "planner_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the planner */,
  "planner_type" TEXT /* Type of planner (e.g., geometric, kinodynamic) */,
  "planner_algorithm" TEXT /* Specific algorithm used within the planner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("planner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., research, engineering) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trial */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the trial */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the trial */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., view trial details, download trial data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the configuration belongs to */,
  "border_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of the border used in the planner */,
  "projection_evaluator" TEXT /* Projection evaluator used in the planner */,
  "range" REAL /* Range of the planner */,
  "failed_expansion_score_factor" REAL /* Score factor for failed expansions */,
  "longest_valid_segment_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of the longest valid segment */,
  "min_valid_path_fraction" REAL /* Minimum valid path fraction */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the planner */,
  "config_version" TEXT /* Version of the configuration */,
  "config_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the configuration */,
  "config_status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)
